rows.source_ref: eelfranz, "Trading Made Simple", ForexFactory thread 291622 (2011), https://www.forexfactory.com/thread/291622-trading-made-simple ; a simplified variation of Dean Malone's Synergy/TDI method (compassfx.com).
rows.concept: Momentum crossover: go with the trade when the TDI fast price line (green) crosses its signal line (red) at the open of a fresh Heiken-Ashi candle, in the direction confirmed by Stochastic(8,3,3).
rows.eligibility_reason: Deterministic TDI green/red crossover entry (candle 1-2 only, not 3+) plus swing-high/low stop is pure-MQL5 implementable, no ML; but the exit ('green TDI goes flat / hooks over / makes a check-mark reversal') is discretionary and TDI parameters are only implied by a '5-MA TDI' template, so it needs mechanization.
rows.notes: Single core method; variants folded in: 'bounce trade' (re-enter when green bounces off red and continues) and Dean-Malone Synergy channel stop (SlushFund: stop on the opposite 5-EMA of a two-5-EMA channel). Setup is CROSS, not merely green touching red. Direction rule: TDI rising=long, falling=short. Author-preferred TFs H4 (night) and H1 (first 3h of USA/NY open); one M5 example shown; claimed on '8 pairs' (unspecified) and '70-80% wins' (unverified retail claim). Retail forum source, no backtest evidence -> reputability lowers priority. Yet-another FX momentum-crossover swing variant, low orthogonality to existing sleeves.
